name: Notion MCP
description: Official Notion MCP server. Lets AI agents search, read, create, and update Notion pages, databases, and blocks via Model Context Protocol — full workspace access.

skills.name: Page Search
skills.description: Search across Notion workspace pages and databases with keyword and filter queries

skills.name: Page Create
skills.description: Create new Notion pages with rich content blocks including text, tables, and embeds

skills.name: Database Query
skills.description: Query Notion databases with filters, sorts, and property projections via MCP

skills.name: Block Editing
skills.description: Append, update, and delete content blocks within any Notion page programmatically

skills.name: Property Update
skills.description: Update database item properties including relations, selects, dates, and formulas
